return(function(r,A,t,l,h,n,x,W,T,M,u,B,K,e,H,j,E,s,g,G,i,U,z)M,i,B,e,E,H,u,z,K,G,T,s,U,W,j,g={},function(r,J)local A=H(J)local t=function(t,l,h,n,x)return K(r,{t;l,h;n;x},J,A)end return t
